case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. WENDY REYES SUAZO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) NARALLANI SANCHEZ, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,762.21 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SUAZO, WENDY REYES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED JAN-27-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SUAZO, WENDY REYES

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESETNED BY NARALLANI SANCHEZ, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WENDY REYES SUAZO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
